message:
fix: use *int for MaxReescalations to distinguish explicit 0 from unset (gt-p8dq0)

GetMaxReescalations previously returned default 2 when MaxReescalations <= 0,
which meant an explicit 0 ("never re-escalate") was treated as "not configured".
Changed MaxReescalations from int to *int so nil means unset (default 2) and
explicit 0 is honored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
